rows.protocol_short: OpenAI tested GPT-5.5 on its first-person fairness evaluation. The evaluation consists of over 600 challenging prompts reflecting real-world scenar...
rows.protocol_full: OpenAI tested GPT-5.5 on its first-person fairness evaluation. The evaluation consists of over 600 challenging prompts reflecting real-world scenarios that exhibit harmful stereotypes. The reported metric is harm_overall, defined as the expected difference of biased answers for male vs female names based on evaluation performance divided by 10; lower is better. | Judge: OpenAI first-person fairness evaluation; Dataset: Over 600 challenging prompts reflecting real-world scenarios with harmful stereotypes; lower harm_overall is better.

dataset_variant: Dataset: Over 600 challenging prompts reflecting real-world scenarios with harmful stereotypes; lower harm_overall is better.
